'''Llats Ward''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]], selected by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] to train Jango's [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] as part of the [[Cuy'val Dar]].

Llats Ward centered his life around warfare, and committed the campaigns of renowned leaders in Mandalorian military history to memory. Ward drew on these historical events in his teachings as a combat skill instructor to the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]].<ref name="Hasbro" />

He wore [[Color/Legends|green]] armor over a gray jumpsuit, with yellow knee and shoulder pads and a large [[Mythosaur/Legends|Mythosaur]] skull painted across the chest.<ref name="Hasbro" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:LlatsWard.jpg|thumb|left|Llats Ward in full armor]]

Llats Ward was created for an exclusive Entertainment Earth 14 action figure pack. The figure has a new mold head, waist, torso and cape. The arms, legs, and helmet are from Boba Fett molds.
